recommendations.title: Dust Devil
recommendations.overview: A woman on the run from her abusive husband encounters a mysterious hitch-hiker.

recommendations.title: The Theatre Bizarre

recommendations.director: David Gregory, Karim Hussain, Tom Savini, Douglas Buck, Richard Stanley, Buddy Giovinazzo, Jeremy Kasten

recommendations.title: Dark Cloud
recommendations.overview: Following the aftermath of a horrific accident, a woman is voluntarily subjected to artificial intelligence for rehabilitation.

recommendations.title: Upgrade

recommendations.title: Demon Seed
recommendations.overview: A scientist creates Proteus, an organic supercomputer with artificial intelligence which becomes obsessed with human beings, and in particular the creator's wife.

recommendations.title: Godzilla Against MechaGodzilla
recommendations.overview: JSDF pilot Akane has a fateful encounter when a new Godzilla emerges in Tateyama. As a countermeasure, a cyborg named Kiryu is constructed from the remains of the original. The machine is discovered to harbor the restless soul of the original monster
